0221110100122200021 - ASI: 16

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  12 = 1 * 2
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  021 = 0 * 21
  022 = 0 * 22
  1010 = 10 * 10
  2200 = 22 * 00
  02211 = 022 * 11
  10100 = 1010 * 0
  122200 = 12 * 2200
  122200021 = 122200 * 021
  0221110100 = 02211 * 10100
  0221110100122200021 = 0221110100 * 122200021
